description: P0 Admin API routes: Order detail with admin actions, dispatch board, store toggle, collections view. These are the critical admin operations needed for daily store management from mobile.
steps: Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/orders/[id]/route.ts - GET returns full order detail for admin (all fields including items, customer, address, delivery partner, timeline, payment, billNumber, printCount). PATCH allows updating order fields (acknowledge, assign delivery partner, set billNumber). Follow pattern from apps/web/app/api/admin/orders/[id]/route.ts.

Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/orders/[id]/acknowledge/route.ts - POST to mark order as acknowledged. Set acknowledgedAt, acknowledgedById. Create OrderEvent. Follow apps/web/app/api/admin/orders/[id]/acknowledge/route.ts.

Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/orders/[id]/assign/route.ts - POST to assign delivery partner. Accept {deliveryPartnerId}. Set deliveryPartnerId, deliveryAssignedAt, generate deliveryOtp. Create AssignmentEvent and OrderEvent. Follow apps/web/app/api/admin/orders/[id]/delivery/route.ts.
Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/orders/[id]/print/route.ts - POST to record print from admin. Increment printCount, set printedAt.

Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/dispatch/route.ts - GET returns dispatch board data: unassigned orders (READY_FOR_DELIVERY without deliveryPartnerId) and available delivery partners with their current order count.

Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/collections/route.ts - GET returns daily collection summary per delivery partner. Accept date query param. Aggregate DeliveryCollection records by partnerId for the given date.
Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/store-toggle/route.ts - GET returns current store open/closed status (from Settings table, key='store_open'). POST toggles the store open/closed state.

Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/returns/route.ts - GET returns list of return requests with filters (status). PATCH to approve/reject a return request. Follow patterns from the ReturnRequest model.
acceptance_criteria: All admin API routes exist under apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/
Each route uses authenticateMobileRequest and checks for admin roles (ADMIN/OWNER/MANAGER/STAFF)
Order detail returns all fields needed for admin management
Dispatch route returns both unassigned orders and available partners
findings: All 8 admin route files created successfully. TypeScript compilation (tsc --noEmit) and Next.js build both pass with zero errors. Routes follow the existing mobile admin pattern from admin/stats and admin/orders routes. The assign route uses crypto.randomUUID() for eventId and Math.floor(100000 + Math.random() * 900000) for OTP. Audit logging done via prisma.auditLog.create directly (no @/lib/audit import). The dispatch route uses Prisma _count with nested where for active order counts per delivery partner.
